questions.question: How did Paul divide the Sanhedrin during his trial?
options: By claiming to be on trial for the hope of resurrection
questions.answer: By claiming to be on trial for the hope of resurrection

questions.question: How many men formed a conspiracy and took an oath not to eat or drink until they had killed Paul?
Paul's nephew discovered the plot to kill Paul and reported it to the commander.
The following night, the Lord stood by Paul and said, 'Be of good _____.'
The commander sent Paul to Governor _____ in Caesarea with a military escort.
